win_condition: When any player has 2 or fewer train cars remaining, each player gets one final turn. Highest score wins.
tiebreaker: Player who completed the most destination tickets wins. If still tied, player with the Longest Route bonus wins.

categories.label: Route Points
categories.description: Points earned during the game from claiming routes (1-15 points based on route length).

categories.label: Completed Destination Tickets
categories.description: Add the face value of each completed destination ticket.

categories.label: Incomplete Tickets (Penalty)
categories.description: Subtract the face value of each incomplete destination ticket.

categories.label: Longest Continuous Route
categories.description: 10 bonus points for the player with the longest continuous path of routes.
